children.heading: Authority of Director
children.label: a Authority of Director
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to alter, diminish, repeal, or supersede any authority conferred on the Director pursuant to , and .section 1632 of this titlesection 2004a of title 42
that comprise an area of one-half acre or less and that are used by individual families on lands to which they hold legal or beneficial title;
of any size that have been or are being operated for a profit; or
where solid waste from an industrial process is being or has been routinely disposed of at a privately owned facility in compliance with applicable Federal laws.

Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to amend or modify the authority or responsibility of the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency under the Solid Waste Disposal Act ( et seq.).42 U.S.C. 6901
Nothing in this chapter is intended to amend, repeal, or supersede any provision of the Solid Waste Disposal Act ( et seq.).42 U.S.C. 6901
